10.reason: [Incorrect full condition: i is index (max 99). Should be i>=99 or i==99.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: Stack capacity is 100, but index i starts at -1, so the maximum index is 99. Condition should be i >= 99 to check if stack is full before pushing.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect full condition: i is index (max 99). Should be i>=99 or i==99.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect check for stack full: after 100 pushes i=99, condition should be i>=99 to prevent writing out of bounds]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  i represents the index of the top element. Since the array size is 100 (valid indices 0-99), the stack is full when i reaches 99. Checking i>=100 allows an out-of-bounds write to s[100]. It should be i>=99.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The array s has a size of 100 (valid indices 0 to 99). When i reaches 99, the stack is full. Checking i>=100 allows an out-of-bounds write to s[100]. It should be i>=99.
